# Search Long-Tail Insurance

Feed distribution is volatile. Search gives durability.

## Search insurance rule

Every batch must include at least two search-native videos.

Search-native means:

```text
exact problem phrase in spoken hook
exact problem phrase in title/caption
visual demonstration of solution
step labels or clear structure
answer delivered quickly
```

## Feed vs search split

| Mode | Opening | Metric |
|---|---|---|
| Feed | tension, contrast, result-first | chose-to-view, early hold |
| Search | direct answer to query | search traffic, 7d/30d views |
| Hybrid | keyword + visual contrast | both |

## Search title examples

Weak:

```text
“This trick changes everything”
```

Strong:

```text
“How to place captions on Reels without covering the subject”
“Best first frame for YouTube Shorts retention”
“How to fix low average percentage viewed on Shorts”
```

## Search insurance batch

For every topic cluster, produce:

```text
1 feed-native myth/problem video
1 search-native tutorial
1 checklist/saveable version
1 teardown/proof version
1 sendable identity version
```

This creates multiple paths to discovery.
